summary: Run a bounded strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen on the second freshly tracked re-image candidate.
scientific_rationale: r01 did not show a clear usable strong-pi ODMR resonance, so per human guidance we move to the next candidate. The second fresh re-image candidate tracked at 39.367 kcps at [115.864332,117.919934,116.274661] um. The planning model remains a +/-50 MHz screen around the expected ms=+1 resonance near 3.875 GHz, with B about 358.6 G, 13C Larmor about 0.384 MHz, and strong-pi time about 50 ns. The previous r01 pODMR drift analysis flagged both averages and estimated about 351 s per average, above the 300 s daytime cap, so this r02 screen uses 4 averages x 20000 repetitions to keep each per-average window near half that while preserving similar total shot budget and even snake-scan balance.
expected_evidence: terminal savedexperiment and raw readout export for r02 strong-pi pODMR
raw/readout-aware evidence for or against a clear resonance
success_criteria: bridge execute completes with nonzero acquired data
raw readouts show a clear resonance-scale feature above drift/noise/baseline variation
no tracking/count-collapse/hardware anomaly invalidates the data
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
verifier or MATLAB advisory blocks execute
RunExperiment aborts or returns zero averages/no saved data
bridge_action: execute managed single-item batch for pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1
